hero.subtitle: IZUMI MACHINE TOOLS
hero.description: Izumi Kinzoku Kogyo Co., Ltd. — Making your manufacturing process shine with prompt and meticulous service.

about.label: About Us
about.description:
Izumi Kinzoku Kogyo Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of high-precision grinding machines and super finishers headquartered in Tondabayashi, Osaka. Since its founding in 1953, we have consistently pursued research and development of grinding technology, providing optimal grinding solutions for customers in a wide range of industries including automotive parts, bearings, and machine tools.

Izumi Kinzoku manufactures energy-saving and sustainable machinery. We also provide overhaul services to help extend the life of existing equipment.

internal-grinders.fullDesc:
Internal grinding machines are machine tools for precision grinding of workpiece inner diameter surfaces. IZUMI internal grinders achieve world-class machining accuracy through years of grinding technology expertise and innovative design.

**Key Features**
・High-rigidity machine structure ensures stable machining accuracy even for fine internal diameter grinding
・Hydrostatic spindle improves rotational accuracy and durability
・Various gauge options enable in-line high-precision measurement
・NC-controlled automation for high productivity
・Compact design saves space

**Applications**
Automotive parts (engine components, transmission parts), bearings (inner rings), hydraulic/pneumatic equipment parts, various industrial machinery parts, and all fields requiring high-precision internal diameter processing.

features.title: High-Rigidity Design
features.desc: Special casting structure and carefully selected materials minimize vibration during grinding, achieving high-precision finish surfaces.

features.title: Hydrostatic Spindle
features.desc: Equipped with proprietary hydrostatic work spindle. Achieves rotational accuracy below 0.1μm and enables stable machining even during long continuous operation.

features.title: NC Multi-Axis Control
features.desc: X-axis, Z-axis, and spindle tilt angle are NC-controlled. Complex internal surface shapes can be easily set via programming.

internal-grinders.scopeItems: Automotive parts (engine, transmission), bearings (inner rings), hydraulic/pneumatic parts, industrial machinery parts

external-grinders.fullDesc:
External grinding machines are machine tools for precision grinding of workpiece outer diameter surfaces. IZUMI external grinders are highly regarded in automotive, aerospace, and precision instrument industries.

**Key Features**
・CNC full-axis control enables processing of complex outer diameter shapes
・High-rigidity spindle plunge mechanism ensures stable machining
・Various automation options (loaders, unloaders, gauges, etc.)
・Multi-stage machining support for high productivity
・Environmentally conscious energy-saving design

**Applications**
Shafts, rollers, pins, bearing outer rings, automotive parts (camshafts, crankshafts), various industrial rollers, and all fields requiring high-precision outer diameter processing.

features.title: High-Rigidity Spindle
features.desc: Unique bearing arrangement and high-rigidity spindle housing suppress vibration even during heavy cutting.

features.title: Automation Systems
features.desc: Various automation options available including gantry loaders and magazine-type supply devices.

features.title: Versatile Measurement
features.desc: Standard-equipped with pre-machining measurement, post-machining measurement, and flag processing functions required for quality control.

external-grinders.scopeItems: Shafts, rollers, pins, bearing outer rings, automotive parts (camshafts, crankshafts), industrial rollers

dual-grinders.fullDesc:
Dual grinding machines are groundbreaking machine tools that can simultaneously grind inner and outer diameters in one chucking. Eliminating chucking errors, they pursue the ultimate coaxiality between inner and outer surfaces.

**Key Features**
・Simultaneous inner/outer diameter grinding in one chucking with zero chucking error
・Simultaneously achieves high precision, high efficiency, and labor savings
・Automatic loading system for labor reduction
・High-precision measurement possible for both inner and outer surfaces
・Compact design saves space

**Applications**
Bearings (simultaneous inner/outer ring processing), automotive parts, hydraulic/pneumatic equipment parts, various industrial machinery parts, and precision components requiring coaxiality between inner and outer diameters.

features.title: One-Chuck Grinding
features.desc: Simultaneously grinds inner and outer diameters in one chucking. Completely eliminates chucking errors for ultimate coaxial accuracy.

features.title: Space-Saving Design
features.desc: Integrates two grinders into one unit. Reduces floor space by 40% and contributes to line efficiency.

features.title: Full Automation
features.desc: Automates all processes from loading to measurement. Enables unmanned day-and-night continuous production.

dual-grinders.scopeItems: Bearings (simultaneous inner/outer ring processing), automotive parts, hydraulic/pneumatic parts, industrial machinery parts

tripod-grinders.fullDesc:
Tripod grinders are specialized machine tools for simultaneously grinding the three outer diameter surfaces of tripod rollers used in automotive CVTs and ATs. IZUMI holds the world's top market share in this field.

**Key Features**
・3-axis simultaneous grinding reduces processing time to 1/3
・Independent axis control enables subtle dimensional adjustments
・Dedicated loader enables high-speed workpiece supply
・In-line measurement for 100% inspection
・Shape error correction function maintains highest accuracy

**Applications**
Automotive CVT/AT tripod rollers, various multi-face outer diameter processing, hydraulic motor rollers, and parts requiring simultaneous high-precision grinding of multiple outer diameter surfaces.

features.title: 3-Axis Simultaneous Grinding
features.desc: Simultaneously grinds three outer diameters of tripod rollers, significantly reducing processing time.

features.title: Special Shape Capability
features.desc: Complex outer contours can be freely machined with CNC programs.

features.title: Auto-Correction Function
features.desc: Automatically corrects based on feedback from measurement devices, always maintaining stable machining accuracy.

tripod-grinders.scopeItems: Automotive CVT/AT tripod rollers, multi-face outer diameter processing, hydraulic motor rollers

super-finishing.fullDesc:
Super finishing machines are machine tools for further precision finishing of surfaces after grinding. IZUMI super finishers achieve mirror surface finishes with surface roughness below Ra0.01μm through a unique high-speed oscillation mechanism.

**Key Features**
・Lightweight finishing head oscillates at high speed for stable finished surfaces
・Mirror surface finishing with surface roughness below Ra0.01μm
・Stone pattern direction control enables anisotropic finished surfaces
・Compatible with various workpiece shapes
・Environmentally conscious energy-saving and low-noise design

**Applications**
Bearings (inner/outer rings), automotive parts (shafts, rollers), hydraulic cylinders, various precision instrument parts, and all fields requiring high surface quality.

features.title: High-Speed Oscillating Head
features.desc: Proprietary lightweight oscillating head operates at high speed, forming uniform finished surfaces.

features.title: Mirror Surface Finish
features.desc: Achieves surface roughness below Ra0.01μm, providing high-precision finish surfaces that can eliminate polishing processes.

features.title: Anisotropy Capability
features.desc: Freely controls stone pattern direction, also enabling functional anisotropic finished surfaces.

super-finishing.scopeItems: Bearings (inner/outer rings), automotive parts (shafts, rollers), hydraulic cylinders, precision instrument parts
